name: ijro-ai-enterprise-platform
description: AI-powered edu.ijro.uz monitoring, task control and Telegram notification platform.

scripts.build: npm --workspace ai run build && npm --workspace backend run build && npm --workspace bot run build && npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace ai run typecheck && npm --workspace backend run typecheck && npm --workspace bot run typecheck && npm --workspace frontend run typecheck
